🌱 Add open-policy-agent-opa-: Optimize activation of bundles with no inter-bundle path mission (#1658)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-policy-agent-opa-7144-optimize-activation-of-bundles-with-no-inter-bundle-p",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-policy-agent-opa-: Optimize activation of bundles with no inter-bundle path overlap",
+    "description": "Optimize activation of bundles with no inter-bundle path overlap. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-policy-agent-opa- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-policy-agent-opa- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nhelm list -n open-policy-agent-opa- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-policy-agent-opa- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-policy-agent-opa- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-policy-agent-opa- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get configmap -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-policy-agent-opa-\n```\n## What is the underlying problem you're trying to solve?\n\nIn our production environment, we have noticed that OPA bundle activation would take up to 20 minutes with only 5 bundles (2 data bundles with `data.json` only and 3 policy bundles with Rego"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Optimize activation of bundles with no inter-bundle path…",
+        "description": "### Why the changes in this PR are needed?\n\nWhen multiple bundles are loaded into OPA using the bundle plugin, it takes a long time to active the bundles according to the logs. Profiling results has shown that most of the activation time is spent in checking path conflicts.\n\nThis PR avoids\n```yaml\n$ tar tzf data-bundle.tar.gz\n/.manifest             <- \"roots\": [\"foo/bar\"]\n/data.json\n\n$ tar tzf policy-bundle.tar.gz\n/.manifest             <- \"roots\": [\"foo/authz\", \"foo/baz\"]\n/foo\n/foo/authz\n/foo/authz/authz.rego\n/foo/baz\n/foo/baz/baz.rego\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get events -n open-policy-agent-opa- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Optimize activation of bundles with no inter-bundle path…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### Why the changes in this PR are needed?\n\nWhen multiple bundles are loaded into OPA using the bundle plugin, it takes a long time to active the bundles according to the logs. Profiling results has shown that most of the activation time is spent in checking path conflicts.\n\nThis PR avoids unnecessary path conflict checking when no root overlaps are guaranteed.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ tar tzf data-bundle.tar.gz\n/.manifest             <- \"roots\": [\"foo/bar\"]\n/data.json\n\n$ tar tzf policy-bundle.tar.gz\n/.manifest             <- \"roots\": [\"foo/authz\", \"foo/baz\"]\n/foo\n/foo/authz\n/foo/authz/authz.rego\n/foo/baz\n/foo/baz/baz.rego"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "open-policy-agent-opa-",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "open-policy-agent-opa-"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],

+    ],

+    },

+  },
